headline: Iran peace deal ignites semi rip — INTC +8.6%, MRVL +11.7%; desk takes INTC & VRT long at half size

market_state.line: SPY +0.79%, QQQ +1.87%; VXX stress ratio 0.94 — vol crushed, risk-on rotation into semis/cyclicals on geopolitical unwind. Green light for e

actions.line: Trump/Iran catalyst drove +8.6%; desk buys half size — signal neutral on low vol but risk green, R/R ~2:1.
No fresh catalyst but signal agrees and risk is green; half size, ~2:1 R/R on data-center infrastructure momentum.

watch.line: High-confidence bear ripple from INTC: Apple volume shift to Intel foundry directly cannibalizes TSMC's N3/N2 mix.
QuantumScape +14.9% on news, rel-vol 1.12 — only mover with above-avg volume confirmation. Watch for follow-through.
KMX +6.5% on strong print; bullish ripple to ALLY, COF (auto lending), SAH (used-car comps) — none priced in yet.
KR -5.8% on margin/traffic miss — standard share-gain read-through to WMT and COST; SFM faces sympathy de-rate.
Medium-confidence bull ripple: INTC advanced-node ramp drives incremental WFE orders; AMAT is INTC's largest equipment supplier.

changed: Regime same (risk_on) but now driven by Iran peace deal catalyst — prior scan flagged SPY/QQQ pullback, today both are firmly bid
Desk trimmed from 4 technical longs to 2 (INTC + VRT); INTC now has a hard fundamental catalyst vs. prior scan's technical-only picks
RXT +21% leadership gone; semi complex (INTC, MRVL, SNDK) now dominates mover list
caveats: RTH scan as of 11:34 ET 2026-06-18 — prices and levels stale by time of read; INTC entry at 131.46 may already be through given intraday momentum.
INTC ripple logic (TSM bear, AMAT bull) assumes Apple-to-Intel foundry shift is real and sustained — still speculative; size accordingly.
